purpose: Pin the bridge that joins bd-juvqm.3 / bd-8b70o (LiveMeasurementPair) and bd-hp41p (P99Delta) into a single drive. Today a budget gate that wants to compare Conservative and Seqlock lanes p99 against an allowed budget would have to (a) call run_live_measurement_pair, (b) THROW AWAY the underlying TailStats it just computed, and (c) re-drive both lanes via tail_stats::compute again to feed compute_p99_delta — wasteful and racy. This bridge reuses the SAME drive: the LiveMeasurementRow values the pair carries are derived from the exact TailStats the P99Delta is computed from, so callers can hand the returned P99Delta to validate_p99_delta_against_budget without further work.

downstream_consumers.consumes: Timing-side-channel budget gate — gets P99Delta + LiveMeasurementPair from the same drive.
Lane-pair anchoring + budget classification in one call.
